**Which region?**
<!-- State / area, and the local-script name if you know it. -->

**What makes its dining etiquette distinctive?**
<!-- The feast or everyday meal format, how people eat, serving customs, etc. -->

**Community variations to be aware of**
<!-- Differences by faith, community, or occasion we should represent fairly. -->

**Can you help write it?**
- [ ] Yes, I'd like to contribute the content
- [ ] I'm suggesting it for someone else to write
